experience.text: I develop projects focused on Back-end and APIs using TypeScript, prioritizing clean and scalable code. In addition to building robust services, I have experience in Front-end with JavaScript and external APIs, as in the Animais Fantásticos project, and in interface design (UX/UI Design), applied in the Bikcraft project.

projects.name: Bikcraft
projects.description: High-precision and quality electric bicycles, custom-made for the customer. Explore the world at your own pace with Bikcraft.

projects.name: Fantastic Animals
projects.description: Foxes are mammalian and omnivorous animals belonging to the Canidae family. They are medium-sized vulpines.

projects.name: Cubo
projects.description: Be creative, develop motor skills, focus, patience, and help your brain improve its cognitive abilities. Get your Rubik’s cube now.

education.text: Software Engineering student at Unimar with a technical degree in Systems Development from Etec Professor Basilides de Godoy. I am seeking my first opportunity in the technology field, with a focus on backend development.

footer.text: I’m currently available for new projects. Contact me and let’s have a conversation 👋
